mapper.sql: id, source, source_job_id, source_url, title, company_name, location, job_category_raw, employment_type_raw, salary_raw, posted_at, deadline_at, description, original_payload_json, payload_hash, freelance_type, recommendation_type, collected_at, updated_at

AND freelance_type <> 'NOT_FREELANCE' AND recommendation_type <> 'EXCLUDED'
AND ( deadline_at IS NULL OR deadline_at >= NOW() )

if.test: condition != null and condition.keyword != null and condition.keyword != ''

sql.if: AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') OR company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') )

mapper.sql:
ORDER BY
CASE WHEN deadline_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, deadline_at ASC, id DESC
collected_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO external_job ( source, source_job_id, source_url, title, company_name, location, job_category_raw, employment_type_raw, salary_raw, posted_at, deadline_at, description, original_payload_json, payload_hash, freelance_type, recommendation_type, collected_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{source}, #{sourceJobId}, #{sourceUrl}, #{title}, #{companyName}, #{location}, #{jobCategoryRaw}, #{employmentTypeRaw}, #{salaryRaw}, #{postedAt}, #{deadlineAt}, #{description}, #{originalPayloadJson}, #{payloadHash}, #{freelanceType}, #{recommendationType}, #{collectedAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), source_url = VALUES(source_url), company_name = VALUES(company_name), location = VALUES(location), job_category_raw = VALUES(job_category_raw), employment_type_raw = VALUES(employment_type_raw), salary_raw = VALUES(salary_raw), posted_at = VALUES(posted_at), deadline_at = VALUES(deadline_at), description = VALUES(description), original_payload_json = VALUES(original_payload_json), payload_hash = VALUES(payload_hash), freelance_type = VALUES(freelance_type), recommendation_type = VALUES(recommendation_type), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM external_job WHERE id = #{id} AND freelance_type <> 'NOT_FREELANCE' AND recommendation_type <> 'EXCLUDED' AND ( deadline_at IS NULL OR deadline_at >= NOW() )
